metadata.note: MinIO measurements deferred to integration environment. These LocalFS numbers establish the Phase 4 latency budget baseline.

flush_latency_us.description: Time for db.flush() to complete (writer visibility barrier)

single_get_latency_us.description: Time for db.get(key) on a warm database

prefix_scan_10k_latency_us.description: Time to scan 10,000 entries via scan_prefix()

durable_commit_latency_us.description: Time for put() + flush() (single key durable commit)

transaction_commit_latency_us.description: Time for begin() + put() + commit() + flush()

write_batch_1mib_latency_us.description: Time to write a 1 MiB WriteBatch (1024 x 1KiB values)
